message:
cleanup: remove genuinely dead code from cli, core, and journal

- Remove unused `cli_cx_with_timeout_secs` and stale `Budget` import (ffs-cli)
- Remove unused `encode_btrfs_extent_prealloc` test helper (ffs-core)
- Remove unused `EpochManager::advance` method (ffs-journal)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
